title: Foreword & Administration
summary: How the standard is structured, adopted and applied on a project.
description: The Foreword and Administration sections explain the purpose of the NCS, how to reference and adopt it on a project, and how the component standards fit together.

title: AIA CAD Layer Guidelines
summary: The coordinated layer naming system used across all disciplines.
description: A complete, hierarchical CAD layer naming convention (discipline designators, major/minor groups, status) with downloadable Excel reference tables.

title: Uniform Drawing System (8 Modules)
summary: Set organization, sheets, schedules, drafting conventions, terms, symbols, notations and code conventions.
description: The eight UDS modules: (1) Drawing Set Organization, (2) Sheet Organization, (3) Schedules, (4) Drafting Conventions, (5) Terms & Abbreviations, (6) Symbols, (7) Notations, (8) Code Conventions. Includes downloadable DWG/LIN/PAT symbol files.

title: BIM Implementation
summary: Guidance for applying the standard within BIM workflows.
description: How the NCS conventions map onto Building Information Modeling — object naming, coordination and deliverables.

title: Plotting Guidelines
summary: Standardized line weights, screening and pen tables for predictable output.
description: Plotting Guidelines define line weights, screening percentages and pen-table assignments so printed and PDF output is consistent across firms. Includes Excel tables.

title: Appendixes & Data Files
summary: Downloadable Excel, DWG, LIN and PAT files that accompany the online document.
description: Excel files (AIA Layer Guidelines, UDS Terms & Abbreviations, Schedules, Regulatory Information, Plotting tables) and DWG/LIN/PAT files (UDS Symbols), downloadable from the licensed online document.
